payload.text: Failed. Details: The user-provided container failed to start and listen on the port defined provided by the PORT=8080 environment variable within the allocated timeout. This can happen when the container port is misconfigured or if the timeout is too short. The health check timeout can be extended. Logs for this revision might contain more information.  happened when deployment

To resolve the deployment failure ("container failed to start and listen on the port defined provided by the PORT=8080"), we need to ensure the development server is configured to listen on port `8080` and host `0.0.0.0`. entries.description: Create Vite configuration to bind server to port 8080 and host 0.0.0.0 to satisfy container deployment requirements.
Add module script tag to load index.tsx entry point.
